creator: mmatalka@gmail.com
text: I'm not sure if this is the right bug report but I wanted to post that I'm on 15.0-CURRENT #6 main-n267044-eb4d13126d85 experience panic sometimes on suspend/resume.  It doesn't happen all the time.  My susepnd/resume involves unloading the wifi kernel mod (I thought maybe this would resolve the issue) and stopping wlan0 interface.  No dice.
